creator: andy@openirc.co.uk
text:
The AMI MG80649 RAID controller, such as on the I-Will KK266-R, does not appear to be supported in FreeBSD at present.

Fix: 

Sadly I can't offer anything better than 'write driver'. If I could then I would but I just ain't that kinda genius.
How-To-Repeat: 1) Purchase/steal/otherwise obtain some kind of motherboard that uses said RAID chipset.
2) Purchase/steal/otherwise obtain sufficient drives for a RAID array.
3) Create a RAID array as per instructions/intuition.
4) Boot into FreeBSD.
5) Attempt to use said RAID array and note that this appears to be impossible.
6) (optional) Be annoyed at the above fact.
